summary: This is a high-volume domain specialist with exceptional demonstrated edge in Russia-Ukraine and Trump/US markets, underpinning $4.4M in realized PnL and nearly legendary ELO scores. However, the trader's performance outside these two domains is catastrophically poor (12.6% accuracy, 339 losses in 'Other'), meaning signals must be strictly filtered by domain. The recent resolved trades — 15 consecutive losses on the same Harris dropout question — raise behavioural concerns about sunk-cost averaging and cross-domain overconfidence. Follow this trader closely in Russia_UKR and Trump_US, but actively exclude or fade signals in all other domains.
